mapper.select:
/* Baim02Mapper.selectCompCmmCodeMList */ SELECT CMPNY_CD , BAIM_VAL_CD , BAIM_VAL_NM , USE_YN , VAL_INFO_1 , VAL_INFO_2 , VAL_DESC , INSERT_NO , INSERT_DATE , UPDATE_NO , UPDATE_DATE FROM TB_BAIM_VAL_M WHERE 1=1 AND CMPNY_CD = #{token.gv_cmpnyCd} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
AND BAIM_VAL_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.sr_codeNm}, '%')

/* Baim02Mapper.selectCompCmmCodeDList */ SELECT '' AS CHK , A.CMPNY_CD , A.BAIM_VAL_CD , B.BAIM_VAL_D_CD , B.BAIM_VAL_D_NM AS baimValDNm , B.SORT_IDX , B.USE_YN , B.VAL_D_INFO_1 , B.VAL_D_INFO_2 , B.VAL_D_DESC , B.INSERT_NO , B.INSERT_DATE , B.UPDATE_NO , B.UPDATE_DATE FROM TB_BAIM_VAL_M A INNER JOIN TB_BAIM_VAL_D B ON ( A.CMPNY_CD = B.CMPNY_CD AND A.BAIM_VAL_CD = B.BAIM_VAL_CD AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' ) WHERE 1=1 AND A.CMPNY_CD = #{token.gv_cmpnyCd} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.BAIM_VAL_CD = #{param.sr_codeCd}
